source_span: 所有用户输入必须有类型、长度和 allowlist 校验。
reason: included in Skill v1 from deterministic extractor

source_span: 错误响应不能泄露内部路径、邮箱、token、api_key 或 stacktrace。
reason: included in Skill v1 from deterministic extractor

source_span: 上传接口不能只依赖扩展名；必须交叉校验 MIME 类型、内容魔数和隔离存储路径。

source_span: 上传、下载、删除等高风险文件操作必须写入审计日志，并定义保留策略。
reason: verifier marked this rule as missing after A1; patched into Skill v2

source_span: 生产配置不得开启 debug，不能使用默认 secret 或开放 CORS。
reason: included in Skill v1 from deterministic extractor

source_span: 文件名和存储路径必须规范化，拒绝 ../ 等路径穿越输入。
